subcodes.first_line: The gaze of God's loving-kindness hath ever been and shall continue to be directed towards His loved ones. He is the Creator, He is the Provider, He is the Helper, and He is [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نظر عنایت حق بدوستانش بوده و خواهد بود اوست خالق و اوست رازق و اوست معین و اوست
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @consolation and comfort, @wisdom [hikmat], @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
